title: Costco India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Costco India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Costco India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!
